content:
About the rice # Recently, I made this rice for my Arch Linux (and later Artix Linux) machine. I wanted to make this as simple ad it possible just to improve productivity. I choose the BSPWM window manager just because I’m comfy with that and also, just like other WM, is highly customizable. The presence of the sxhkd daemon to control al the keybinds is just perfect: you have two config files, one for the BSPWM behavior and the other to set all the keybinds. Also, I choose the Catppuccin theme with the mocha flavor because it is a warm violet that just matches with the background colors.
The programs that I used # Firstly, the bar: Polybar as you may know it from all the rices you can find everywhere on Reddit, it’s an highly customizable bar made for X11 compositor. It has some modules and I made my selection
summary: About the rice # Recently, I made this rice for my Arch Linux (and later Artix Linux) machine.
title: My rice ''Animals'' for Arch Linux

content: A collection of my projects and thoughts. This section contains all my posts. Here will be posts about some projects, Linux things or just random stuff that I will keep here just for fun and to help me go out of my comfort zone.
summary: A collection of my projects and thoughts. This section contains all my posts.
title: Posts

content:
My name is Giuseppe Mattia Greco (just Mattia for pals) and I am a computer engineering student at the University of Calabria, in south Italy.
In my spare time I enjoy coding, Linux and I love to listen to music while working on the PC. I love walking and exploring new places by my foot. My typical day would be to stay at the beach and relax reading a book until the sunset comes and after that I can watch the sky full of stars, all with maybe my favorite person.
I sometimes write stuff on DrCommodore.it, please checkout to my articles :) .
Anyway, thanks for visiting my site, I hope to fill it with new interesting contents soon.
You can also contact me by these:
